untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ADF/KPSS statistical test for stationarity (p < 0.10) and explicit standard deviation distance calculation from rolling mean. These statistical tests are not available in the allowed indicator set. SMA_63 is approximated, but the critical ADF test condition and precise std_dev_multiple thresholds cannot be expressed with allowed indicators.
translation_notes: The signal fundamentally relies on statistical mean-reversion tests (ADF/KPSS) that are not available as pre-computed indicators. The rolling mean window of 63 periods has no direct SMA equivalent in the allowed list (closest would be sma_50 or sma_100). Price deviation measured in standard deviations (std_dev_multiple=1.0) cannot be calculated from allowed indicators without explicit volatility measures. The exit condition of '+0.5 standard deviations toward mean' also requires standard deviation calculations not available. Consider adding: adf_pvalue, kpss_pvalue, rolling_std_dev, or price_zscore to the allowed indicators.
